creator: kouji@cty-net.ne.jp
text:
Under heavy disk I/O, use ioctl(CCISS_PASSTHRU).

Fix: Easy way, not use ciss_wait_request() from ioctl(CCISS_PASSTHRU).
but, CPU load is upped when called ioctl(CCISS_PASSTHRU).

patch is,
How-To-Repeat: I use cciss_vol_status-1.03 command, under heavy disk I/O.
like extracting large.tar.gz.
ciss_vol_status-1.03 command called many times ioctl.

When paniced FreeBSD.
# iostat 1
